assets.provenance_state: May be generated from derived atmosphere rules only; no source screenshots, brand marks, or copied visual motifs.
assets.text_editability: Background must contain no essential text; all headlines, labels, and gate language remain native PPT text.
assets.license_state: Requires recorded generation prompt, model/provider, date, and review status before public use.
render_risks: Bitmap crop may hide the focal field at 16:9.
High contrast may reduce headline legibility.
Atmosphere may look generic if unrelated to the product decision.
accessibility_risks: Text contrast can fail over busy areas.
Background may imply meaning that is unavailable to screen readers.

assets.provenance_state: Created as an original system mark from derived rules; must avoid copied identity motifs or proprietary assets.
assets.text_editability: SVG contains shape geometry only; any labels are separate editable PPT text.
assets.license_state: Internal original asset pending human visual review before public release.
render_risks: SVG gradients or masks may render inconsistently in PowerPoint.
Overly detailed paths may become hard to edit.
Static mark may become decoration if not tied to slide state.
accessibility_risks: Meaning can be lost without an adjacent text label.
Low-contrast strokes may disappear in projector conditions.

assets.provenance_state: Built from native shapes using derived process stages: source data, memory, generation, QA, and release gate.
assets.text_editability: All stage labels and proof notes remain editable PPT text; shapes are native where possible.
assets.license_state: No external visual license needed if constructed from original native shapes.
render_risks: Equal-weight process boxes can flatten the intended reveal.
Too many labels can turn the slide into a report.
Connector alignment can drift after PowerPoint edits.
accessibility_risks: Flow order must be readable from left to right or top to bottom.
Color alone must not communicate pass or blocked states.

assets.provenance_state: Uses experiment arm labels and derived comparison rules; no copied charts or deck screenshots.
assets.text_editability: State names, delta label, and implication line remain editable; chart data should be editable or rebuildable from native shapes.
assets.license_state: Internal chart asset; requires source data notes and human review before public claim use.
render_risks: Too many metrics can make the chart read as a dashboard.
Equal bar or panel weights can hide the intended outcome.
Small labels may fail in exported images.
accessibility_risks: Delta must be labeled in text, not only color.
Comparison order must be clear for non-visual review.
